overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking up a stone stairway through a golden ginkgo forest toward a Japanese temple gate, then entering a courtyard with a five-tier pagoda. The scene features vibrant autumn foliage, falling leaves, and traditional wooden architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway through golden ginkgo forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the stone stairs beneath the golden canopy of ginkgo trees

entered.detail: dense avenue of golden yellow ginkgo trees lining both sides of the path
ancient stone steps leading upward through the forest
stone warrior statues flanking the stairway entrance

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a stone stairway flanked by stone guardian statues, walking through a dense avenue of golden ginkgo trees under bright midday sun. The path leads upward toward a distant temple gate visible through the canopy.

events.description: golden leaves begin falling more prominently around the path

agents.ego_description: continuing up the stairs toward the temple gate ahead, passing stone lanterns

entered.detail: large wooden temple gate with curved black roof and red pillars at the summit of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending the stone stairway as the temple gate grows larger ahead. Golden leaves fall through the air, and stone lanterns line the path. The guardian statues fall behind as the character approaches the main gate structure.

events.description: entering the shadowed interior of the temple gate, light becomes dimmer

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark wooden gate structure with hanging lanterns

entered.detail: shadowed wooden gate interior with red pillars and hanging paper lanterns

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shadowed interior of the temple gate, passing between thick wooden pillars. The bright golden forest is left behind as the character moves through the dimly lit passage, with a glimpse of the pagoda visible through the far exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard with pagoda and campfire

events.description: exiting the gate to reveal the open courtyard and five-tier pagoda ahead
character stops walking and turns to observe the campfire and pavilion

agents.ego_description: walking into the courtyard then stopping to observe the campfire and pagoda

notable_agents.action: tending to the campfire in front of the wooden pavilion

entered.detail: tall black five-story pagoda with golden accents silhouetted against the blue sky
burning campfire with smoke rising in front of the pavilion
traditional wooden temple building with curved roof and open sides

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the gate, the scene opens into a sunlit temple courtyard with a magnificent five-tier pagoda dominating the view. The character approaches a campfire where NPCs are gathered near a wooden pavilion, then stops to look around the Golden Temple area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant forest ascent into the serene architecture of a temple complex. It begins with a character climbing a stone stairway flanked by guardian statues, moving through a dense avenue of golden ginkgo trees under a bright midday sun. As the character ascends, the path is lined with stone lanterns and falling golden leaves, leading closer to a looming temple gate. The scene then shifts into the shadowed interior of the gate, passing between thick wooden pillars that momentarily block the forest light before revealing a glimpse of a pagoda ahead. Finally, the camera emerges from the dim passage into a sunlit courtyard, opening up to a magnificent five-tier pagoda and a campfire where NPCs gather near a wooden pavilion.
